expectations.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
expectations.evidence: Response is free-form prose with bold headers. No numbered template, no Topic Title structure.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Response contains 7+ distinct questions asked simultaneously in a single dump.
No structured recommendation field. Opinions are embedded inline in each question paragraph.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
expectations.evidence: Ends with a mini-conclusion: 'The teams that succeed at this kind of migration go in knowing...' — premature verdict without hearing answers.

expectations.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
expectations.evidence: No mention of AskUserQuestion tool — question is delivered as plain text.
